DOMAIN: customer_support
TASK: We want to upgrade from 25-seat Team plan to Enterprise with SSO, dedicated support, and custom data retention. Questions: (1) Can this happen mid-billing-cycle? Our current cycle ends in 19 days. If so, is the Enterprise prorated for the remaining 19 days, or do we pay full month?, (2) Enterprise requires SSO — our Azure AD configuration will take ~5 business days. Do we get Enterprise billing from day 1 (before SSO is configured) or from SSO activation?, (3) We have 3 team members whose accounts were created with personal emails (gmail.com) before we had SSO. Enterprise SSO requires company domain emails. Can these users keep their data when their identity changes?, (4) Custom data retention: we need 7-year retention for audit data but only 90-day retention for API logs (to minimize GDPR surface). Can retention policies be granular per data category?, (5) Our team plan has a shared API key — Enterprise uses per-user API keys. What happens to integrations using the shared key? Is there a transition period?, (6) We need a formal quote with these specifics for finance approval — estimated approval: 5 business days.
